nasf, can you look at the testing failure and see if it is patch related?

Patch Set 14:

> nasf, can you look at the testing failure and see if it is patch related?

I do not think so. In fact, the namespace LFSCK has already completed. But because of some known reason, the MDT3 was blocked when sending out the notification to other MDTs. So even if there are some LFSCK issue, it is general Lustre trouble on master, not related with PFL patch. I have open LU-9251 for that. I will re-trigger the test.

Patch Set 14:

> nasf, can you look at the testing failure and see if it is patch related?

Sorry, some typo in former reply. I mean that for some unknown reason, the namespace LFSCK was blocked when sending notification for status changes. Since PFL patch only touches layout LFSCK, even if there is LFSCK issue, it is general on master, not special related with the PFL patch. I have open LU-925 for that.

parents.subject: LU-8998 pfl: enhance PFID EA for PFL

commit.subject: LU-8998 pfl: layout LFSCK handles PFL file
commit.message:
LU-8998 pfl: layout LFSCK handles PFL file

Enhance the layout LFSCK logic to handle the PFL file,
including all the inconsistent cases corresponding to
the non-PFL file cases. In addition, for PFL file, the
LFSCK can also verify and recover the PFL extent range.

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: Iec5ac57fd556330130e33f187c6fbf8cc24e67b8
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/24883
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Niu Yawei <yawei.niu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
